description: No Protobuf serializer implementation exists. gRPCRequest in request_types.py has no binary codec. Limits gRPC and inter-language scenarios to JSON only.
proposed_solution: Add ProtobufSerializer implementing ISerializer; generate Python protobuf stubs; extend SerializerType enum; integrate with PipelineConfig for automatic selection

description: No MessagePack serializer exists. MsgPack is more compact than JSON for binary payloads and essential for high-throughput WebSocket/gRPC-streaming scenarios where wire size matters.
proposed_solution: Add MsgPackSerializer via msgpack library implementing ISerializer; add to codecs/ package; support native dict/list/bytes serialization without BaseModel constraint

description: No CBOR serializer exists. CBOR (RFC 8949) is IETF standard for concise binary representation required for IoT/COSE/CWT constrained environments.
proposed_solution: Add CBORSerializer via cbor2 library implementing ISerializer; add to codecs/ package and SerializerType enum

description: No Apache Avro serializer exists. Required for schema-registry ecosystems (Kafka, Hadoop) with schema evolution support. Schema registry integration would enable forward/backward compatibility.
proposed_solution: Add AvroSerializer with avro library; implement schema registry integration; add schema versioning fingerprint to serialized bytes for evolvability

description: No adaptive compression algorithm selector exists. CompressionAdapter uses fixed algorithm set at init. Cannot dynamically select gzip for HTML/text vs zstd for binary blobs based on content type or payload size.
proposed_solution: Add ContentTypeAnalyzer that reads magic bytes and content-type headers to select optimal algorithm + compression level; integrate into CompressionAdapter.compress decision path

description: No Snappy compression support exists. Snappy (google-snappy) is designed for high-speed/low-CPU compression ideal for latency-critical streaming where gzip/zstd overhead degrades throughput.
proposed_solution: Add Snappy to CompressionAlgorithm enum; implement snappy compress/decompress via python-snappy; select automatically for streaming paths via ContentTypeAnalyzer

description: No charset detection or conversion exists. PipelineConfig.charset defaults to utf-8 but is only used in encode_stream bypass. Incoming Shift-JIS, Latin-1, or other encodings arrive untransformed. SSEStreamCodec._parse_sse_frame uses errors='replace' causing silent data loss.
proposed_solution: Add chardet-based charset detection; add iconv/conversion between source encoding and utf-8 in pipeline.decode and decode_stream; make config-disablable via PipelineConfig

description: No metrics or monitoring hooks in PresentationPipeline. Zero observability for compression ratio, serialization latency, throughput, or error rates. Cannot detect serialization bottlenecks or silent compression failures in production.
proposed_solution: Add optional Counter/Timer hooks in pipeline.encode/decode/encode_stream/decode_stream measuring: pre/post compression size, serialization duration, errors per codec, bytes processed; injectable via PipelineConfig using structlog or OpenTelemetry spans
